title: Dropdown Menu Component
content:
This module provides a set of accessible and composable dropdown menu components, built on top of `@radix-ui/react-dropdown-menu`.

It offers a variety of primitives to construct custom dropdown menus with features like submenus, radio groups, checkboxes, and labels.

## Key Exports

*   **`DropdownMenu`**: The root component that wraps all other dropdown menu elements.
*   **`DropdownMenuTrigger`**: The button or element that opens the dropdown menu.
*   **`DropdownMenuPortal`**: Renders children into a portal, typically used to ensure the menu appears above other content.
*   **`DropdownMenuSub`**: A context provider for creating nested submenus.
*   **`DropdownMenuGroup`**: Groups related menu items.
*   **`DropdownMenuRadioGroup`**: A group of radio items where only one can be selected at a time.
*   **`DropdownMenuSubTrigger`**: The trigger for a submenu.
*   **`DropdownMenuSubContent`**: The content container for a submenu.
*   **`DropdownMenuContent`**: The container for the dropdown menu items.
*   **`DropdownMenuItem`**: A single selectable item within the dropdown menu.
*   **`DropdownMenuCheckboxItem`**: An item that can be checked or unchecked.
*   **`DropdownMenuRadioItem`**: An item within a radio group.
*   **`DropdownMenuLabel`**: A label for a group of menu items.
*   **`DropdownMenuSeparator`**: A visual separator between menu items.
*   **`DropdownMenuShortcut`**: Displays keyboard shortcuts associated with menu items.

## Usage Example

```tsx
import {
  DropdownMenu,
  DropdownMenuContent,
  DropdownMenuItem,
  DropdownMenuTrigger,
  DropdownMenuSeparator,
  DropdownMenuLabel,
  DropdownMenuCheckboxItem,
  DropdownMenuRadioGroup,
  DropdownMenuRadioItem,
} from "@/components/ui/dropdown-menu";

function MyDropdown() {
  const [checked, setChecked] = React.useState(false);
  const [radioValue, setRadioValue] = React.useState("default");

  return (
    <DropdownMenu>
      <DropdownMenuTrigger asChild>
        <Button variant="outline">Open Menu</Button>
      </DropdownMenuTrigger>
      <DropdownMenuContent className="w-56">
        <DropdownMenuLabel>My Account</DropdownMenuLabel>
        <DropdownMenuSeparator />
        <DropdownMenuItem inset>
          Profile
        </DropdownMenuItem>
        <DropdownMenuItem inset disabled>
          New Team
        </DropdownMenuItem>
        <DropdownMenuSeparator />
        <DropdownMenuLabel inset>Others</DropdownMenuLabel>
        <DropdownMenuCheckboxItem
          checked={checked}
          onCheckedChange={setChecked}
        >
          
        </DropdownMenuCheckboxItem>
        <DropdownMenuRadioGroup value={radioValue} onValueChange={setRadioValue}>
          <DropdownMenuRadioItem value="default">
            Default
          </DropdownMenuRadioItem>
          <DropdownMenuRadioItem value="compact">
            Compact
          </DropdownMenuRadioItem>
        </DropdownMenuRadioGroup>
      </DropdownMenuContent>
    </DropdownMenu>
  );
}
```

## Props

Each exported component accepts standard HTML attributes and specific props inherited from `@radix-ui/react-dropdown-menu` and the `cn` utility for class name manipulation. Some components also accept an `inset` prop for adjusting indentation.
